title: rothmannia riparia
intro: Rothmannia riparia, also known as the African tree marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in African folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rothmannia riparia include treating wounds, reducing fever, and relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Rothmannia riparia can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and digestive issues.
